description.LOCATION_EN: Airport Express Line and Tung Chung Line Service Disruption
description.LOCATION_CN: 機場快綫及東涌綫服務延誤

2024-09-09T17:54:00.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that Extra travelling time can be expected on the Airport Express & Tung Chung Line. In-town Check-in service close out time is extended from 90 minutes to 120 minutes.
2024-09-09T17:54:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知， 機場快綫及東涌綫列車預計需要額外行車時間。 市區預辦登機服務的截止時間，將由飛機起飛前的90分鐘改為飛機起飛前的120分鐘。

2024-09-09T18:11:00.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that Due to a signalling fault at Nam Cheong Station, Airport Express and Tung Chung Line trains will operate at a slower speed at Nam Cheong Station. This could extend the total journey time on the Airport Express between Hong Kong Station and AsiaWorld-Expo Station by 30-40 minutes and on the Tung Chung Line between Hong Kong Station and Tung Chung Station by 30-40 minutes. In-town Check-in service close out time is extended from 90 minutes to 180 minutes until further notice.
2024-09-09T18:11:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知， 由於南昌站有信號故障，機場快綫及東涌綫列車駛經該路段時需要慢駛，機場快綫來往香港站及博覽館站的行車時間預計需要額外30-40分鐘及東涌綫來往香港站及東涌站的行車時間預計需要額外30-40分鐘。 市區預辦登機服務的截止時間，將由飛機起飛前的90分鐘改為飛機起飛前的180分鐘，直至另行通知。

2024-09-09T18:39:00.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that The signalling fault at Nam Cheong Station on the Airport Express & Tung Chung Line has been repaired. Normal train service is gradually resuming. In-town Check-in service close out time remains at 180 minutes.
2024-09-09T18:39:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知， 南昌站的信號故障已完成復修。機場快綫及東涌綫列車服務逐步回復正常。 市區預辦登機服務的截止時間維持為飛機起飛前的180分鐘。

2024-09-09T19:07:00.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that The signalling fault at Nam Cheong Station on the Airport Express & Tung Chung Line has been repaired. Normal train service is gradually resuming. In-town Check-in service close out time resumed to 90 minutes.
2024-09-09T19:07:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知， 南昌站的信號故障已完成復修。機場快綫及東涌綫列車服務逐步回復正常。 市區預辦登機服務的截止時間恢復為飛機起飛前的90分鐘。
